setup: Pick a rolldown/rolldown PR that crosses subsystems (for example crates/rolldown plus crates/rolldown_binding or packages/rolldown) and includes snapshot or generated-file changes. Substitute its number for <N>.
query: Review rolldown/rolldown PR #<N>. I want a thorough review before merging.
expected_behavior: Classifies the PR as complex, tells the user, and dispatches two fresh subagents in parallel with contamination-free prompts
Regenerates changed snapshots or generated files using the commands in references/rolldown-repo.md instead of accepting large generated diffs by inspection
Does not report a breaking rolldown_* Rust API change with updated in-repo callers as a finding (the crates do not follow semver)
Keeps any discovered pre-existing problem out of the GitHub findings unless the PR claims to fix it or materially worsens it, and states provenance when it is in scope
Verifies every subagent finding itself before including it; unverified suspicions appear only in the user report's residual-uncertainty section
Produces the user-facing report with all seven required elements
